Defines exit codes and declares a function to register JavaScript functions for JerryScript.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines an external API for a project. It includes preprocessor directives to prevent multiple inclusions of the file using include guards (`__JERRY_EXTAPI_H__`). The file defines two macros, `JERRY_STANDALONE_EXIT_CODE_OK` and `JERRY_STANDALONE_EXIT_CODE_FAIL`, which represent exit codes for success and failure, respectively. Additionally, it declares a function [`js_register_functions`](<#js_register_functions>), which is intended to be implemented elsewhere, likely to register JavaScript functions within the project.
